commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: As being yourselves also in the body. That is, liable to troubles and afflictions as long as you are in a mortal body. (Witham)

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Remember them that are in bonds, as bound with them; and them who suffer adversity, as being yourselves also in the body. See how large is his discourse concerning chastity. Follow peace, he said, and holiness; Lest there be any fornicator or profane person Hebrews 12:14; and again, Fornicators and adulterers God will judge. Hebrews 12:16 In every case, the prohibition is with a penalty. Follow peace with all men, he says, and holiness, without which no man shall see the Lord: But fornicators and adulterers God will judge.
